stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
The screen on the right in the figure is an example of a (1) _____ it is configured to always show (2) _____. If the right screen fails, the left screen will automatically adapt to show (3) _____.

options.a: (1) Electronic Flight Instrument System (EFIS); (2) Navigation data; (3) Flight controls synoptic
options.b: (1) Multi-Function Display (MFD); (2) Engine data; (3) Engine data
options.c: (1)Primary Flight Display (PFD); (2) Attitude and air data; (3) Navigation map
options.d: (1) Engine Indication and Crew Alerting System (EICAS/ECAM); (2) Flight management data; (3) Weather radar
